intentAndPurpose.intent: Non-interactive icon in a tinted container (role="image"). attention high = bold fill, medium = subtle tint, resolved against the parent <Surface>. Five sizes (xs…xl), 9 appearances. Pass a JDS <Icon> / glyph component for `icon`. Use IconButton for an interactive version.

props.name: icon
props.description: JDS <Icon> / glyph component (or ReactElement). Semantic name strings are not resolved on native — pass the component. — [warn] Pass a JDS <Icon> or glyph component; a bare <Svg> with its own fill ignores the surface-resolved colour.

props.name: attention
props.description: high = solid bold fill, medium = subtle tinted fill (resolved against the parent <Surface>).

props.name: appearance
props.description: Multi-accent role for the fill. 'auto' → primary.

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Recommended for non-decorative use; node is only exposed to assistive tech when set.

props.name: aria-hidden
props.description: Collapses the node from assistive tech.

icon.description: JDS <Icon> / glyph component (or ReactElement). Semantic name strings are not resolved on native — pass the component.
